---
title: "Impressum"
---

## Information according to § 5 DDG

Responsible for the content of this website:

**Mauricio Moreno**

40215
Germany

## Contact

Email: mauriciomoreno@example.com

## Disclaimer

The contents of this website have been created with care. However, no guarantee is given regarding the accuracy, completeness, or currentness of the information provided.

## Copyright

Unless otherwise stated, all content on this website is protected by copyright.
Please contact me before reproducing or using any materials beyond personal use.
